case_title: JENNA MICHELLE SINCLAIR ET AL VS. GENE VOLOSHIN ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SINCLAIR, JENNA MICHELLE SEAMAN, MICHAEL BYERRUM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VOLOSHIN, GENE AGRANOVSKY, NELLY $880.00 PRINCIPAL, $132.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,012.00, DEFENDANTS SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT OF $770.00 AGAINST THE JUDGMENT WHICH IS AN AMOUNT WHICH DEFENDANTS HAVE ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFFS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $48.00) SERVED JUL-10-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VOLOSHIN, GENE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-02-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-02-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT NELLY AGRANOVSKY WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AT TODAYS HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $34.00) SERVED JUL-10-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AGRANOVSKY, NELLY

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY SINCLAIR, JENNA MICHELLE SEAMAN, MICHAEL BYERRUM AS TO DEFENDANT VOLOSHIN, GENE AGRANOVSKY, NELLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-02-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-02-2015 - JUDGMENT.
